subject: Fw:
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: petranemcova@mac.com

Date: Sun, 20 Jan 2008 17:22:25 
To:"Jeffrey Epstein" <kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Re:


I'm sorry that the photos were misleading. They showed true the view as it is. I'm glad that the video could show the whole surrounding and that is hard to do with photos. 
I'm sorry for any inconvenience.
So just that I understand clearly, Jeffrey doesn't want to see any of the houses in Prague?
Thank you so much
Sending much love
------Original Message------
From: Jeffrey Epstein
To: Petra Nemcova
To: Petra Nemcova
ReplyTo: Jeffrey Epstein
Sent: 16 Jan 2008 11:45
Subject: 

Hello Petra, 
Jeffrey said there is no need to have anyone meet us in Prague but thank you for all your help. Hope all is well!


P.S. Jeffrey was also very concerned about the misleading Cape Town house photographs.


Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
